title: Small Open Window Light Curtains Moving Softly
sourceTitle: Small Open Window Light Curtains Moving Softly
prompt: small open window with light curtains moving softly in the breeze, overlooking a quiet garden just beginning to bloom. A vase with spring flowers sits on the windowsill, slightly forgotten, while sunlight spills across the frame and into the room. The moment feels still, warm, and quietly comforting. Rendered in soft painterly style with warm tones, gentle textures, and a calm, inviting atmosphere. --ar 3:4 --v 8
